3131260.name: Whimpact!
3131260.description:
The world of the Whims is fading—and they need you to bring it back to life. In Whimpact!, you’ll team up with Whims, magical creatures who grow stronger as you care for them. These vibrant allies unlock incredible powers, which will be tested in fast-paced, multiplayer arenas, where cooperation and friendly competition collide in high-energy egg hunts. Customize your home base, collect fantastic outfits, and explore a world bursting with color, creativity, and a bit of chaos.

Collect and Raise Companion Creatures

When you save Weary Whims from their dreary fate, they reveal their color and their power. By giving them a home and tending to them with food, outfits, furniture and attention, they get stronger. Take them as companion creatures into the arena and they imbue you with various amazing super powers. The stronger they get, the better you play!

Cooperative Arena

Journey to The Beyond, solo or with up to eight players, to reclaim Starcane energy. This extreme egg hunt will put your new-found skills to the test, as you and your teammates try to find and gather the most valuable Starcane bundles by navigating difficult obstacles before time runs out. The more points your team scores, the better rewards you receive!

Tons of Personalization

Decorate your Home Tile to show off your style AND level your whims up faster. Earn cosmetics to personalize your player character and display your accomplishments. Dress your whims up in an ever-growing number of outfits.

Hang with Friends

Up to eight players can bring their Home Tiles together to form a neighborhood at the center of your Home World. Explore Nearby lands together, helping each other complete daily quests and practicing your skills in this non-timed world. Then venture together into timed sessions to see how far up the leaderboard your team can get!

Key Features:

  • Collectible creatures called Whims

  • Cooperative, timed, egg hunt-style arena

  • Customizable and decoratable home base

  • Customizable player characters

  • Hundreds of earnable cosmetics and decorators

  • Whim outfits

  • NPC quest givers who reveal more about the world

  • Skills progression via Whim skill trees

  • Six core skills (Speed, Strength, High Jump, Long Jump, Magnetization and Antifreeze) to take on various obstacles in the world.

  • Melee combat with robotic creatures

  • A bright, colorful world that needs your help to stay that way!
